nasb.text: and he spoke to the congregation, saying, “Depart now from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing that belongs to them, or you will be swept away in all their sin.”

esv.text: And he spoke to the congregation, saying, “Depart, please, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest you be swept away with all their sins.”

cnv.text: 摩西告訴會眾：“你們要遠離這些惡人的帳幕，凡是他們的東西，你們都不可摸，免得你們因他們的一切罪惡同遭毀滅。”

ccb.text: 他对会众说：“你们离这些恶人的帐篷远一点，不要碰他们的任何东西，免得你们因他们的罪而受牵连，同遭毁灭。”
